objective: Add one command schema validation over every node evidence JSON file in the completed wave.
implementation: Added a read-only mission recommendations validate-evidence command.
Added a dependency-free evidence walker that parses every node JSON file, requires schema or contract markers, and applies existing typed validators where Atlas already has them.
Generated a completed-wave evidence validation report for the 40-node hardening wave.
Added node 11 post-merge lifecycle evidence after PR 314 CI, merge, sync, and branch cleanup.
